subject: fix: address 10 bugs found in comprehensive codebase review
body:
HIGH:
- embeddingService: worker.onerror now rejects all pending promises
  and emits engine:error (prevents infinite hangs on worker crash)
- embeddingWorker: error responses include id field so service-side
  handler can reject the correct callback; embedBatch early error
  sends batchDone signal
- embeddingService: computeEmbeddingVector uses unique request IDs
  (counter suffix) to prevent callback collision with auto-embedding
- embeddingService: fallback handler for error messages without id

MEDIUM:
- workspaceService: deleteWorkspace now cleans up embeddings and
  arcEmbeddings tables (prevents orphaned data accumulation)
- useGraphData: removed re-throw in async effect, added setLoading(false)
  in catch (prevents unhandled rejection + permanent loading spinner)
- App.tsx: onConfirm wrapper now awaits async callbacks before closing
  dialog (prevents premature dismissal during undo import)
- App.tsx: clearSelection moved inside try block in handleBulkDelete
  (preserves selection on failure so user can retry)
- App.tsx: separate Suspense boundaries per lazy modal (prevents
  one chunk load from unmounting a sibling modal)
- DetailPanel: key includes node.modified to force remount on external
  update (fixes stale useState after bulk edit or import)
- App.tsx: selectedCount passes only selectedNodeIds.size (bulk edit
  only operates on nodes, count shouldn't include arcs)

LOW:
- seedService: replaceDemoData scoped to demo workspace via index
  (prevents full table scan and accidental deletion in other workspaces)
- importExportService: case-insensitive label deduplication in
  buildLabelsFromRaw (prevents "Company" and "company" both surviving)

Tags: bugfix, review, embedding, workspace, ui, import
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: semantic-duplicate-detection
Semver: patch
